overall.description: First-person exploration of the Ravenclaw Common Room from Hogwarts Legacy, ascending spiral staircases through ornate wooden and stone Gothic architecture, culminating in the grand circular main chamber with astronomical ceiling decorations and velvet furnishings.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden spiral staircase with ornate iron railings

agents.ego_description: climbing the wooden spiral staircase, following the curved path upward

entered.detail: curved wooden staircase with light-colored steps winding upward
decorative black wrought iron railing with scrollwork patterns
lit wall-mounted lantern casting warm amber light
dark wood paneled walls lining the staircase

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person ascent up a narrow wooden spiral staircase. Warm light from wall sconces illuminates the ornate iron railings and wooden paneling that enclose the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden study landing with desk and bookshelves

events.description: exits spiral staircase into open study landing area with wooden architecture

agents.ego_description: moving through the study landing, passing the desk with globe and arched bookshelves

entered.detail: wooden desk cluttered with books and papers
antique-style globe on stand sitting on the desk
tall Gothic arched bookshelves filled with books
straight wooden staircase leading upward to the next level

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the spiral stairs into a wooden study landing featuring a desk with a globe, arched bookshelves, and a straight staircase leading further upward. The warm lighting continues from wall sconces.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone staircase with eagle statue and celestial ceiling

events.description: transitions from wooden study to stone staircase architecture
passes beneath the large stone eagle statue at the top of the stairs

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone steps toward the imposing eagle statue and painted celestial ceiling

entered.detail: wide stone steps with dark carpet runner
large stone eagle sculpture with spread wings above the archway
dark painted ceiling with golden astronomical charts and constellations
Gothic pointed archway with stone blocks

segments.scene_description: The architecture shifts to stone as the camera ascends toward a massive eagle statue guarding an archway. The ceiling features an elaborate astronomical mural with golden constellations against a dark background.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved stone corridor with statues and arches

events.description: enters curved stone corridor from the eagle statue landing

agents.ego_description: walking through the curved stone corridor, passing statues and arched windows

entered.detail: curved stone block walls with Gothic architectural details
life-sized stone statue of a robed female figure on pedestal
tall Gothic arched windows with stone tracery
large ornamental vase on pedestal next to the statue

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a curved stone corridor lined with statues and arched windows. A prominent female stone statue stands on the right as the space opens toward the common room entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: Ravenclaw common room main chamber with astronomical ceiling

events.description: enters the grand circular common room with blue carpet and high ceiling
camera tilts upward to view the astronomical ceiling and central chandelier

agents.ego_description: exploring the circular common room, observing the velvet furniture, bookshelves, and ornate ceiling

entered.detail: large circular chamber with high vaulted ceilings and blue drapery
blue carpet with golden star and compass patterns covering the floor
large ornate black iron chandelier hanging from ceiling
blue velvet upholstered sofas and armchairs arranged in seating areas
built-in arched bookshelves in the stone walls filled with books
large stone fireplace at the far end of the room

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the magnificent circular Ravenclaw Common Room, revealing a blue astronomical carpet, velvet seating, and towering bookshelves. The camera pans to show the intricate iron chandelier and painted ceiling before moving toward the distant fireplace.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person ascent from a narrow, intimate wooden staircase into the expansive, celestial grandeur of the Ravenclaw Common Room. It begins by climbing a tight wooden spiral illuminated by warm wall sconces, moving upward until it emerges into a study landing filled with arched bookshelves and a globe. As the camera continues its climb, the architecture shifts from warm wood to cold stone, passing beneath an elaborate astronomical mural and a massive eagle statue guarding an archway. The scene then flows through a curved stone corridor lined with statues and arched windows before finally opening into the magnificent circular main chamber. This final space reveals a blue astronomical carpet and velvet seating, with the camera panning across an intricate iron chandelier and a painted ceiling before drifting toward a distant fireplace.
